content.en:
Zhou Tian is now a nine-star peerless Tianjiao, and his cultivation has also broken the nineteenth physical limit.

It can be said that he is only one step away from becoming a child of the universe.

Now, the Supreme Hall of the Human Race wanted to recruit a large number of Nine-Star Peerless Heavenly Pride, and he was naturally chosen.

this day.

More than 10,000 nine-star peerless Tianjiao came from various star fields to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, the outer hall area.

Here, they will be rigorously nurtured and taught.

As for how many of these people can become children of the universe, it depends on their level of effort and potential.

Zhou Tian came to the outer hall of the supreme hall of the human race, saw so many nine-star peerless Tianjiao, and learned that above the nine-star peerless Tianjiao, there were His Highnesses at the level of the Son of the Universe, and His Highnesses still had specific divisions.

This is simply a place where all the geniuses of the human race gather!

I didn't feel the pressure, I only felt the endless fighting spirit.

In the star field where he is, although his strength is not invincible to the emperor level, he definitely belongs to the top few, if he didn't know that there is a son of the universe above the nine-star peerless Tianjiao, he would have already hit the god level.

"Will the master also be in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race?"

Zhou Tian suddenly guessed.

This speculation is not unreasonable, because his master Ye Tian is very powerful, and his master once said that when he shines on the human race, they may meet.

What does this mean?

"Dazzling the human race, it should mean shining in the supreme hall of the human race, so that the master will know. Zhou Tian thought to himself.

Thinking of this, Zhou Tian's interest in cultivation became heavier, and his desire for the Son of the Universe was also deeper.

Of course, he also wanted to inquire about the situation of Shizun.

It's just that he knows too little about Shizun, and currently he only knows that Shizun's name is Ye Tian, and he doesn't know anything else.

And with just a real name, naturally there is no way to inquire about Ye Tian's situation.

If you know Ye Tian's title, you may be able to find out.

In a flash, ten years have passed.

In the past ten years in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, Zhou Tian's progress has been very huge, and his combat power has completely crushed the other Nine-Star Peerless Tianjiao, almost reaching the limit of the Nine-Star Peerless Tianjiao.

And Zhou Tian's reputation also completely resounded in the outer hall of the supreme hall of the human race, and even attracted the attention of some outer hall universe gods.

In the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, the gods of the universe or the Lord are not allowed to accept any of His Highnesses as disciples, which is a fair competition for His Highnesses.

In case the high-level of the human race continues to accept His Highness as an apprentice, he will secretly cultivate it, which will disrupt the way His Highness competes, which is not conducive to the supreme hall of the human race.

But before becoming His Royal Highnesses, if he accepted Tianjiao as an apprentice, it would not be considered a violation of the rules.

Now, Zhou Tian's reputation is resounding in the outer hall of the supreme hall of the human race, and he is almost recognized as the son of the universe who will inevitably succeed, and there are naturally many people who want to accept Zhou Tian as an apprentice.

Of course, most of the cosmic gods are more reserved and embarrassed to do so, but it doesn't mean that all cosmic gods can't let go.

this day.

A cosmic god in the outer hall of the supreme hall of the human race summoned Zhou Tian.

In front of a glorious temple.

Zhou Tian came here under the leadership of a guard, and he was a little nervous at this time.

He knew that the one who summoned him this time was one of the rulers of the outer hall of the supreme temple of the human race, a great cosmic god.

What a powerful existence the cosmic god is, his lifespan is almost unlimited, and if he is placed in a domain, he is at the overlord level!

He didn't expect such a being to summon him!

Soon, Zhou Tian met this cosmic god, the Cloud Desolation God Lord!

"I've seen the Cloud Desolate God Lord!"

Zhou Tian said nervously.

The Cloud Desolation Divine Lord was a middle-aged man, wearing a purple and gold crown and a golden robe, sitting on a high divine throne overlooking Zhou Tian.

"Zhou Tian, your performance in the outer hall of the supreme hall of the human race is very good, especially your sword path has gone out of its own path, which is far inferior to you even for many highnesses in the inner hall. You will surely be able to become a child of the universe in the future, and you may even hope to shine in the inner sanctum. However, if you practice alone, you may take many detours. I am willing to accept you as a disciple and guide you in your cultivation, so that you can become a child of the universe more quickly and enter the inner sanctum of the supreme hall of the human race!

The Cloud Desolate God Lord asked.

"Apprentices?" Zhou Tian was stunned, he already had this guess, but he didn't expect the guess to come true.

If the others were very excited, after all, it would be such an honor to be accepted by a cosmic god, and the future was immeasurable!

But Zhou Tian politely refused: "Cloud Desolate Divine Lord, I already have a master!"

"Oh, could it be that you worshipped other cosmic gods as teachers?" the Cloud Desolate God Lord frowned.

According to what he knew, the other cosmic gods in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race had not accepted Zhou Tian as a disciple, otherwise he would not have known about it.

Zhou Tian shook his head and said, "I don't know what kind of cultivation my master is, he has only taught me for a while, but if I don't have his permission, I won't worship other people as teachers, and I hope that the Cloud Desolate God Lord will forgive me." "

"Who is your master?"

The Cloud Desolate God Lord asked.

He guessed that Zhou Tian's master should not be a strong man, maybe a small person in a certain star field, as long as he got Zhou Tian's master, then he could accept Zhou Tian as an apprentice.

"My master's name is Ye Tian, as for the rest of the information, I don't know!"

Zhou Tian recounted.

"Ye Tian, this name...... Why is it so familiar?"

The Cloud Desolate Divine Lord pondered for a while, and suddenly thought of someone.

"No way, it shouldn't be the one. That person had just become a god-level and had been practicing in retreat, how could he have time to accept disciples! Moreover, Zhou Tian and that person who were not in the same star field had almost no possibility of acquaintance, let alone the two of them were masters and apprentices!" The Cloud Desolate Divine Lord thought to himself.

However, although he didn't believe it, he still asked casually: "Zhou Tian, do you still remember the appearance of your master?"

"Remember!"

Zhou Tian nodded, and immediately turned into Ye Tian's appearance with his vitality.

When the Cloud Desolate Divine Lord saw Ye Tian's appearance, his pupils immediately shrank, and he said in shock: "Your Highness Wanfa! How can this be !!?"

When Zhou Tian saw the expression of the Cloud Desolate Divine Lord, he immediately knew that the Cloud Desolate Divine Lord knew his master.

"Your Highness Wanfa, could it be that this is the name of my master?" Zhou Tian was surprised, and immediately asked, "Cloud Desolate Divine Lord, do you know my master?"

The Cloud Desolate Divine Lord took a deep breath and said, "I know your master, but we don't know each other. He is a highness in the inner hall of the supreme hall of the human race, and he has just been promoted to the Xuan-level region not long ago. I didn't expect you to be his apprentice, what a blessing!"

He didn't think that Zhou Tian was lying, as a cosmic god, he could easily judge whether an emperor was lying or not.

"Cloud Desolate Divine Lord, do you know my master?" Zhou Tian asked.

"Understood!" the Cloud Desolate Divine Lord said, "Your master, he is far beyond your imagination, although you are now very good in the outer hall of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, but compared to your master, it is much worse. He can be said to be the most talented Highness in the history of our human race, and even in a recent prosperous era, none of the countless Highnesses who crushed the universe races could match him. And he has a great credit to the Terrans, even my status among the Terrans is not as good as your master. Not long ago, the Supreme of our human race said that His Highness Ten Thousand Laws will become the Supreme if he does not die! Maybe you don't know much about the concept of the Supreme, a Supreme, one look can kill me countless times. "

“......"

Zhou Tian was stunned, he knew that his master was a highness just now, and he thought it was just an ordinary god-level highness.

I didn't expect the master to be so awesome!

His Royal Highness, who overwhelmed all the races in the universe, is known as the first Highness in the history of the human race.

He originally thought that he would be able to surpass his master one day, but now that he thinks about it, he probably has no hope of surpassing his master.

"Even if you can't surpass the master, you have to get as close as possible to the master's achievements!"

Zhou Tian felt a lot of pressure, but he was more motivated.

"Since you are a disciple of His Highness Wanfa, I am qualified to accept you as an apprentice, but if you have any doubts about your cultivation in the future, you can come to me at any time!" said the Cloud Desolate Divine Lord with a smile.

He doesn't have a chance to befriend His Highness Wanfa now, but he can make friends with Zhou Tian, a disciple of His Highness Wanfa, and it will only be good for him in the future, not harmful.

"Thank you, Lord Cloud Desolation!"

Zhou Tian said gratefully.

After Zhou Tian left, the Cloud Desolate Divine Lord spread the news of Zhou Tian's arrival in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race to the town hall envoys of the inner hall, and then the town hall envoys of the inner hall spread to the ears of Ye Tian's guards.

Xuan-level area.

Ye Tian was practicing, and a cosmic god guard asked to see him.

"What's the matter?"

Ye Tian asked.

The guard hurriedly said, "Your Highness, there is news from the outer hall that your disciple Zhou Tian has come to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race!"

"Zhou Tian, that kid has come to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, but not too surprised.

With Zhou Tian's qualifications in the Dao of the Dao, it is not difficult to grow up, plus he has improved Zhou Tian's cultivation talent, as long as Zhou Tian works hard to cultivate, he will naturally rise soon.

Ye Tian didn't go to see Zhou Tian, at least now is not the time.

Other than that.

Ye Tian sent guards to block the news, and did not allow Zhou Tian to spread the identity of his disciple, so as not to affect Zhou Tian's cultivation.

"When Zhou Tian really becomes the son of the universe, I'll go see him again!"

Ye Tian thought.

So, he continued to cultivate.

Now, his third set of movements is close to the consummation realm, and the peak-level sword path mastery has also taken shape, and it is not far from truly creating a peak-level sword path mastery.

Coupled with the progress in other aspects, Ye Tian's current strength is infinitely close to that of His Royal Highness the Supreme Level.
